Howdy!\n\nWordPress has a built-in featu:
Howdy!

WordPress has a built-in feature that detects when a Plugin or Àkòrí causes a fatal error on your Ìkànnì, and notifies you with this automated Ímeèlì.
###CAUSE###
First, visit your Ìkànnì (###SITEURL###) and check for any visible issues. Next, visit the Ojúewé where the error was caught (###PAGEURL###) and check for any visible issues.

###SUPPORT###

If your Ìkànnì appears broken and you can't Ìgbààyè your dashboard normally, WordPress now has a special "recovery mode". This lets you safely login to your dashboard and investigate further.

###ÌJÁPỌ̀###

To keep your Ìkànnì safe, this Ìjápọ̀ will expire in ###EXPIRES###. Don't worry about that, though: a Tuntun Ìjápọ̀ will be emailed to you if the error occurs again after it expires.

When seeking help with this issue, you may be asked for some of the following information:
###DEBUG###

###DETAILS###

<strong>Error:</strong> Cookies are bloc: Àṣìṣe: Cookies jẹ́ blocked tàbí kò supported nípasẹ̀ rẹ browser. Ìwọ gbọ́dọ̀ enable cookies sí lò Wọ́dùprẹ́sì.
Àṣìṣe: Cookies jẹ́ blocked due sí unexpected output. Fún help, jọ̀wọ́ see èyí documentation tàbí gbẹ́yìnwò náà support forums.
An unexpected error occurred. Something: Kan unexpected àṣìṣe ṣẹlẹ̀. Something lè jẹ́ wrong pẹ̀lú Wọ́dùprẹ́sì.org tàbí èyí server’s configuration. If ìwọ continue sí have problems, jọ̀wọ́ gbẹ́yìnwò náà support forums.
One or more database tables are unavaila: Ọ̀kan tàbí síi ipamọ́-dátà tables jẹ́ unavailable. Náà ipamọ́-dátà lè need sí jẹ́ repaired.
